title: cyclosorus molliusculus
intro: Cyclosorus molliusculus, also known as the mountain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Cyclosorus molliusculus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
